name: Hippennasse
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the egg whites and cream, then mix well with a whip.
2. In a separate bowl, sieve together the confectioner's sugar and flour. Slowly add the sugar-flour mixture to the egg whites and cream until a smooth paste is formed.
3. Place a teaspoon at a time on a well-greased sheet pan. With the back of a spoon, spread the mixture to approximately 5 inches in diameter.
4. Prepare the basket molds by greasing the bottoms of teacups.
5. Bake cookies for 2 - 3 minutes in a 375°F oven. While still soft, mold into desired basket shapes, then continue baking until light brown and completely dry.
6. Cool and store in an air-tight container until used.
7. To serve, fill cookie baskets with fresh fruit such as raspberries. Garnish with strawberry or apricot puree and fresh mint leaves.
